name: Dijon Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta in boiling water just until done, usually 11 to 13 minutes.
2. Drain and refresh under cold running water.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together oil, vinegar, mustard, and mayonnaise.
4. Add pasta and all other ingredients to the dressing.
5. Mix carefully and taste for seasoning.
6. Chill thoroughly before serving.
